title: agropyron macrourum
intro: Agropyron macrourum, also known as big spike grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Agropyron macrourum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
